message:
fix(acp): resolve flaky integration tests (CleanExit + FullLoop)

CleanExitOnAgentTermination: use Forward() to drive full proxy lifecycle
instead of manual pipe management that left forwardAgentStderr blocked.

FullLoop: replace shell script mock agent with Go TestHelperProcess.
Shell scripts block-buffer stdout in pipes, so responses never arrived.

Closes gt-7vg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
